ddls:
CREATE TABLE "temperature_data" (
  "data_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each temperature data entry */,
  "year" INTEGER /* Year of the temperature data */,
  "region_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the region where the data was collected */,
  "jan" REAL /* Average temperature in January */,
  "feb" REAL /* Average temperature in February */,
  "mar" REAL /* Average temperature in March */,
  "apr" REAL /* Average temperature in April */,
  "may" REAL /* Average temperature in May */,
  "jun" REAL /* Average temperature in June */,
  "jul" REAL /* Average temperature in July */,
  "aug" REAL /* Average temperature in August */,
  "sep" REAL /* Average temperature in September */,
  "oct" REAL /* Average temperature in October */,
  "nov" REAL /* Average temperature in November */,
  "dec" REAL /* Average temperature in December */,
  "source_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the data source */,
  "method_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the data collection method */,
  "quality_score" REAL /* Initial quality score of the data */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date when the data entry was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Date when the data entry was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("data_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_temperature_data_method_id FOREIGN KEY ("method_id") REFERENCES data_collection_methods ("method_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_temperature_data_source_id FOREIGN KEY ("source_id") REFERENCES data_sources ("source_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_temperature_data_region_id FOREIGN KEY ("region_id") REFERENCES regions ("region_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "regions" (
  "region_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each region */,
  "region_name" TEXT /* Name of the region */,
  "location" TEXT /* Location of the region (e.g., North America, Europe) */,
  "contact_email" TEXT /* Contact email for inquiries about the region */,
  "latitude" REAL /* Latitude of the region */,
  "longitude" REAL /* Longitude of the region */,
  "elevation" REAL /* Average elevation of the region */,
  "climate_zone" TEXT /* Climate zone of the region */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("region_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "data_sources" (
  "source_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each data source */,
  "source_name" TEXT /* Name of the data source (e.g., NOAA, MET Office) */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the data source */,
  "source_url" TEXT /* URL of the data source */,
  "last_updated" TEXT /* Date when the data source was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("source_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "data_collection_methods" (
  "method_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each data collection method */,
  "method_name" TEXT /* Name of the data collection method (e.g., Satellite, Ground Station) */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the data collection method */,
  "accuracy" REAL /* Accuracy of the data collection method */,
  "resolution" TEXT /* Resolution of the data collection method (e.g., daily, hourly) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("method_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "temperature_data_sources" (
  "data_source_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each data source entry */,
  "data_id" INTEGER /* ID of the temperature data */,
  "source_id" INTEGER /* ID of the data source */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("data_source_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_temperature_data_sources_source_id FOREIGN KEY ("source_id") REFERENCES data_sources ("source_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_temperature_data_sources_data_id FOREIGN KEY ("data_id") REFERENCES temperature_data ("data_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "temperature_data_methods" (
  "data_method_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each data method entry */,
  "data_id" INTEGER /* ID of the temperature data */,
  "method_id" INTEGER /* ID of the data collection method */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("data_method_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_temperature_data_methods_data_id FOREIGN KEY ("data_id") REFERENCES temperature_data ("data_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_temperature_data_methods_method_id FOREIGN KEY ("method_id") REFERENCES data_collection_methods ("method_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., researcher, data analyst, admin) */,
  "password_hash" TEXT /* Hashed password for user authentication */,
  "last_login" TEXT /* Date of the last login */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of the user's account (e.g., active, inactive) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "access_logs" (
  "access_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each access event */,
  "data_id" INTEGER /* ID of the temperature data being accessed */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user accessing the data */,
  "access_date" TEXT /* Date when the data was accessed */,
  "access_type" TEXT /* Type of access (e.g., view, download) */,
  "ip_address" TEXT /* IP address of the user accessing the data */,
  "user_agent" TEXT /* User agent of the device used to access the data */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("access_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_data_id FOREIGN KEY ("data_id") REFERENCES temperature_data ("data_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "data_quality" (
  "quality_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each quality metric entry */,
  "data_id" INTEGER /* ID of the temperature data */,
  "quality_score" REAL /* Quality score of the data (0-100) */,
  "quality_comments" TEXT /* Comments on the quality of the data */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("quality_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_data_quality_data_id FOREIGN KEY ("data_id") REFERENCES temperature_data ("data_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "data_anomalies" (
  "anomaly_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each anomaly entry */,
  "data_id" INTEGER /* ID of the temperature data */,
  "anomaly_type" TEXT /* Type of anomaly (e.g., spike, drop) */,
  "anomaly_date" TEXT /* Date of the anomaly */,
  "anomaly_value" REAL /* Value of the anomaly */,
  "anomaly_comments" TEXT /* Comments on the anomaly */,
  "cause" TEXT /* Potential cause of the anomaly */,
  "resolution_status" TEXT /* Status of the anomaly resolution (e.g., pending, resolved) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("anomaly_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_data_anomalies_data_id FOREIGN KEY ("data_id") REFERENCES temperature_data ("data_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "data_correlations" (
  "correlation_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each correlation entry */,
  "data_id" INTEGER /* ID of the temperature data */,
  "factor_id" INTEGER /* ID of the environmental factor */,
  "correlation_value" REAL /* Correlation value */,
  "correlation_comments" TEXT /* Comments on the correlation */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("correlation_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_data_correlations_factor_id FOREIGN KEY ("factor_id") REFERENCES environmental_factors ("factor_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_data_correlations_data_id FOREIGN KEY ("data_id") REFERENCES temperature_data ("data_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "environmental_factors" (
  "factor_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each environmental factor */,
  "factor_name" TEXT /* Name of the environmental factor (e.g., CO2 levels, precipitation) */,
  "unit" TEXT /* Unit of measurement for the environmental factor */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the environmental factor */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("factor_id")
)
